_comment: Consumer contract example — nightlights_signals.v1. Post-ingest H3 cell signals as the dashboard would read them from the H3 knowledge store. 3 cells representing a commercial core, a residential fringe, and a dark rural edge. All 5 signals present per cell.

cells._comment: Commercial core — Central Bangalore CBD. High radiance, activity_class=2 (commercial).
Residential fringe — Peri-urban Bangalore / Kengeri. Low-medium radiance, activity_class=1 (residential).
Dark rural edge — outer bbox. Near-zero radiance, activity_class=0 (dark).

data_quality_summary.confidence_note: 2 cells are cloud-contaminated (DATA_CONFIDENCE=0.65). 1 cell has full real VIIRS coverage.
data_quality_summary.cloud_contamination_notice: 2 cells in view have reduced confidence due to cloud cover during the composite period.
